content.text: What is the purpose of whale songs? 3 p.

options.text: Their objective is still somewhat uncertain
Males perform them to entertain other males
Whales use them to reinforce their relationships

options.text: They reduce people’s pain during difficult therapies
They build morale by bringing people together
They encourage people to face stressful treatments

options.text: It allows them to observe previously unnoticeable patterns in the data
It aids them in identifying information that can predict smaller tremors
It enables them to better perceive the underlying causes of earthquakes

questions.main_text:
My superhero 99 p.

​

You want to work at a superhero-themed camp for children aged 8–12. There are all kinds of superheroes, real and fictive. Who is yours and why? As part of your application, write an essay analyzing your superhero. You may use the images as inspiration, if you choose.

​

[LINK text=Katso kuvat täältä.|url=https://yle.fi/plus/abitreenit/2021/Syksy/2021-09-17\_EA\_fi/index.html#17.4.]
